title: Eglin Battlecard No. 002 — Ashby
summary: Second battlecard ships. Key correction vs the Greenhouse framing: Ashby has a real third-party bias audit via FairNow, plus published SOC 1/2 Type II and a five-pillar Responsible AI statement — the cleanly-empty bias-audit ground we could claim against Greenhouse is contested against Ashby. Stratum's defensible wins narrow to MCP completeness today (Ashby's MCP is still 'upcoming', no tool list), continuous governance as architecture (eval set + ledger + Compact refusals are operational, not periodic), and recruiter-console clarity for buyers who find Ashby over-engineered. Pairs with Battlecard 001 for the Compact's differentiation review.
